description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a deep charcoal gray upholstery accented by thin, horizontal orange bands on the armrests and side panels. The sofa consists of two main sections joined at a right angle, providing ample seating space for multiple people. The seat and back cushions are broad, flat, and appear to be firmly attached, giving the sofa a streamlined and uniform appearance. The armrests are low, straight, and integrated into the frame, with a subtle orange accent for visual interest. The legs are slim, black, and slightly recessed, contributing to the floating effect and contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the upholstery, with foam or similar material for cushioning.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa in dark gray with orange accent bands and slim, recessed black legs. It features broad, attached cushions and low, straight armrests for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, three main seat sections, and orange accent bands on the armrests and side panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the right section, the low armrest, and the orange accent band on the far armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, orange accent bands on both ends, and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Top-down view clearly showing the sectional layout, seat arrangement, and the right-angle connection of the two main sections.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six large, rectangular seat cushions and six matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight armrests integrated into the frame at both ends, with a flat profile and orange accent bands; no padding or decorative elements beyond the accent.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, black legs, slightly recessed and positioned at the corners and central support points, with a minimalist, exposed metal design.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented visually by the attached back cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and thin orange accent bands; no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
